title: Fixed Income at Mackenzie Investments
description:
We are thrilled to welcome Charles Lazure and Mathieu Pineau from Mackenzie Investments to QUARCC!

Join us for an in-depth session as they dive into the complexities of the Fixed Income market and share insights from one of Canada’s leading asset management firms.

Whether you’re looking to sharpen your valuation skills or curious about career paths in debt capital markets, this is a session you won’t want to miss.
